blocks.text: Biggest game in Bodø — and the Bernabéu hosts its greatest rivalry

The biggest club game ever played on Norwegian soil. After Galatasaray shocked Liverpool last night, Glimt know anything is possible in European knockout football — Aspmyra becomes a fortress tonight.
🎮 01:00 — rain (FaZe) in ESL Pro League S22, Norway's CS2 ace on the big stage
